title: AL's Dungeons Boss Bars
description: A pack that makes the Boss Bars in the style of Minecraft Dungeons!
body:
![AL's Dungeons Boss Bars logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21787467c6fb3ad1cbe40090182ee25ab6e2063d.png)

# 

This pack makes the Boss Bars in the style of Minecraft Dungeons, NO MODS REQUIRED!

This is a splinter pack of my other pack, AL's Boss Rush, which only includes the new Boss Bars.

Video of the main pack which showcases this feature:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Yi-bHjJ9aB4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:

*Minecraft: Dungeons-inspired Boss Bar designs

*Boss Bar font icons with _FULL language support_
